name: Winner Technology Co., Inc.
summary: Winner Technology Co., Inc. provides video analytic technology solutions in China. The company offers video traffic analytics systems to shopping malls, department stores, exhibition and scenic spots, brand chain stores, and others. The company was formerly known as Winner Information Technology Co., Inc. and changed its name to Winner Technology Co., Inc. in August 2018. Winner Technology Co., Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
